commit_scope: Add Form-native world-model growth cells for ingest, digest, embody, and stored parts.

commands: python3 scripts/scan_form_blueprints.py register WORLD-MODEL-GROWTH --meaning "World-model growth receipt root: sensed readings digested into blueprint, recipe, and named-cell parts, embodied only after trusted-core follow." --defined-in form/form-stdlib/world-model-growth.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/obs-verify.fk form-stdlib/trust-decay.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-field.fk form-stdlib/persistence.fk form-stdlib/world-module-model.fk form-stdlib/world-model-growth.fk form-stdlib/tests/world-model-growth-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `world-model-growth-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The explicit fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  world-model-growth`. Blueprint scan reported no unregistered type-99 or bp string refs; it still reports the pre-existing bp name drift.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A world model can now grow through Form-native receipts: ingest sensed readings, digest observed/absent evidence while preserving nothing as silence, embody only after trusted-core follow, and store blueprint, recipe, and named-cell parts under a content-addressed WORLD-MODEL-GROWTH root.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/obs-verify.fk form-stdlib/trust-decay.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-field.fk form-stdlib/persistence.fk form-stdlib/world-module-model.fk form-stdlib/world-model-growth.fk form-stdlib/tests/world-model-growth-band.fk

phase_gate.gate: World-model growth needs Form-native parts for blueprint, recipe, and named-cell storage before live senses, auto-research, or dashboard embodiment can claim durable truth authority.
phase_gate.next: Attach live mesh/audio/video/model observations to wmg-sense rows, then project WORLD-MODEL-GROWTH parts onto the dashboard and durable substrate carrier.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: world-module-model proved trusted-core follow/refuse and vulnerability reveal, but it did not yet turn surviving truth into blueprint, recipe, and named-cell parts.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: world-model-growth returns 4095 pass-four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt. It stores embodied growth as WORLD-MODEL-GROWTH with three named parts.
not_claimed: live sensor ingestion into wmg-sense rows
durable persisted .fkb store for the growth root
